title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Max Healthcare

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Max Healthcare
jsonLd.description:
We at Max Healthcare are looking for an experienced Medical Officer based out of Kochi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Max Healthcare:
Max Healthcare is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Max Healthcare!
